steps.title: Compare slopes of the two lines
steps.content:
From $y = x + 20$, the slope is $1$.
From $y = 8x$, the slope is $8$.
Since $1 \neq 8$, the slopes are different.

steps.title: Apply the intersection rule for lines
steps.content: When two lines in the plane have different slopes, they must intersect at exactly one point. That matches Choice B — $1$.
